ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genomic_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "chr" TEXT /* Chromosome number */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position on the chromosome */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position on the chromosome */,
  "adipocytes" REAL /* Expression level in adipocytes */,
  "aorta_endothel" REAL /* Expression level in aorta endothelial cells */,
  "bladder_epithelial" REAL /* Expression level in bladder epithelial cells */,
  "blood_b" REAL /* Expression level in blood B cells */,
  "blood_granulocytes" REAL /* Expression level in blood granulocytes */,
  "blood_monocytes" REAL /* Expression level in blood monocytes */,
  "blood_nk" REAL /* Expression level in blood NK cells */,
  "blood_t_cd4" REAL /* Expression level in CD4 T cells from blood */,
  "blood_t_cd8" REAL /* Expression level in CD8 T cells from blood */,
  "breast_basal_epithelial" REAL /* Expression level in breast basal epithelial cells */,
  "breast_luminal_epithelial" REAL /* Expression level in breast luminal epithelial cells */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tissue_types" (
  "tissue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tissue type */,
  "tissue_name" TEXT /* Name of the tissue type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tissue */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Specific cell type within the tissue */,
  "organ_system" TEXT /* Organ system the tissue belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tissue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chromosomes" (
  "chr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chromosome */,
  "chr_name" TEXT /* Name of the chromosome */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the chromosome in base pairs */,
  "assembly_version" TEXT /* Version of the genome assembly */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species the chromosome belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expression_levels" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expression record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "tissue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tissue type */,
  "expression_value" REAL /* Normalized expression value */,
  "expression_unit" TEXT /* Unit of expression measurement */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the expression value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_levels_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES genomic_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's institution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institution_details ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES genomic_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was updated */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of changes in the version */,
  "released_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who released the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES genomic_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_released_by FOREIGN KEY ("released_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., add, delete, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES genomic_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the annotation file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the annotation file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the annotation file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES genomic_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_details" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lead researcher */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_details_lead_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related project */,
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collaborating institution or researcher */,
  "collaboration_details" TEXT /* Details of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_partner_id FOREIGN KEY ("partner_id") REFERENCES institution_details ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES project_details ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_details" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)
